//: Type-check gate for the hand-written TS client bundles (js/*.ts). esbuild does the actual compilation (strips types, no checking); this config drives `pnpm run typecheck` (tsgo --noEmit) so the source is verified type-correct against the generated protobuf-es and ConnectRPC types. allowJs lets the side-effect import of nav.js resolve without being checked.
//exclude: The *.test.ts loopback-lock test imports node:test / node:assert (validated by `pnpm run test` via node --test, not by tsc). It is excluded here so the type-check gate needs no @types/node; the tested function itself lives in daemon.ts and IS checked.
